# RFC 2849 example fixtures

Extracted verbatim from https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc2849.txt with these
corrections for typographical errata in the published text:

- example3: base64 continuation lines were missing their leading space
- example4: one folded comment continuation was missing its leading space
- example5: stray blank line in the middle of the entry removed
- example6: stray blank line inside the first modify record removed
